program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Wrapping up the meeting -- recap the decisions and assign the action items (who does what, by when) -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 16 -- Follow-up & Action Items
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 16 -- Follow-up & Action Items

listenings.text: Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. Here is a quick recap of our meeting. We have three action points. The first task is the report, and you are the owner. The minutes are ready, and I am sending them today. The budget is due on Friday. Please prioritize the deliverable for the client. Thank you, and let us wrap up the rest next week.

Hi Sarah, this is Fernando. Thank you for the recap. I am the owner of two action points. The first task is the report. I am sending it on Thursday. The second deliverable is the budget, and it is due on Friday. I will prepare the minutes tonight. Let us wrap up the project next week.
